decks.notes: This deck aims to apply constant pressure on the opponent with aggressive creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Phelia, Exuberant Shepherd while disrupting their strategy with cards like Galvanic Discharge and Prismatic Ending. Teferi, Time Raveler helps control the board and protect your creatures, while cards like Solitude and Wrath of the Skies provide removal options. Consign to Memory and Fable of the Mirror-Breaker offer card advantage and flexibility. The deck looks to quickly overwhelm the opponent and disrupt their plays, while maintaining a steady stream of threats.

This aggro deck focuses on disrupting opponent's resources and locking down their plays while quickly building up a board presence with aggressive creatures. It utilizes a mix of control elements and high-value creatures to pressure the opponent and maintain advantage. The deck combines tempo plays with efficient removal to control the game state and ensure victory through attrition. The strategy involves deploying threats and disrupting opponent's strategies while staying ahead on board development and putting pressure on the opponent to close out the game quickly.

This deck focuses on utilizing cards like Ruby Medallion, Pyretic Ritual, and Manamorphose to quickly generate mana and play out Ral, Monsoon Mage and Past in Flames to combo off. Glimpse the Impossible and Reckless Impulse help dig for key combo pieces, while Grapeshot serves as a finisher. The deck also includes some land fetching cards like Arid Mesa and Scalding Tarn to ensure consistent mana production. With the right setup, this deck can quickly overwhelm opponents with a powerful storm combo.

The deck focuses on utilizing various control elements such as counterspells, removal spells, and planeswalkers like Narset and Teferi to disrupt the opponent's game plan while drawing cards and maintaining card advantage. It also aims to control the board with sweepers like Supreme Verdict and Solitude while leveraging powerful enchantments like Lórien Revealed and Monumental Henge. The deck aims to maintain control of the game by setting up a board state where the opponent is unable to effectively execute their strategy.

The deck focuses on assembling the Broodscale Bloodchief combo by utilizing cards like Glaring Fleshraker, Basking Broodscale, and Eldrazi Temple. It aims to overwhelm the opponent with powerful creatures and disrupt their strategy with Malevolent Rumble and Kozilek's Command. The inclusion of cards like Ugin's Labyrinth and Ancient Stirrings helps in finding key pieces of the combo quickly. The use of different lands like Grove of the Burnwillows and Boseiju, Who Endures adds versatility and resilience to the deck, making it a formidable force in Modern 1 vs 1 matches.

This deck aims to quickly deploy aggressive creatures while disrupting opponents with cards that tax their resources. It combines efficient threats like Ragavan and Phelia with disruptive elements like Prismatic Ending and Consign to Memory to control the pace of the game. The deck also utilizes powerful synergies such as Ephemerate with Solitude and Quantum Riddler to generate additional value. By pressuring opponents while disrupting their game plan, this deck aims to overwhelm them before they can establish their own strategy.

This deck focuses on using the Cascade mechanic to cast creatures with varying abilities from the library, putting pressure on the opponent and disrupting their game plan. The key concept is to manipulate the graveyard with cards like Living End to bring back powerful creatures while disrupting the opponent's board state with counterspells like Force of Negation. The deck also includes ways to control the battlefield and draw cards to maintain momentum. The goal is to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of creatures and disruption, leading to a swift victory.

This deck focuses on assembling the UrzaTron lands (Urza's Tower, Mine, and Power Plant) to generate a large amount of mana quickly. It utilizes powerful Eldrazi creatures like Thought-Knot Seer and Ulamog, the Ceaseless Hunger, supported by control cards like Karn, the Great Creator and Ugin, the Eye of the Storms. The goal is to control the board state with removal and disruption while playing large threats that can quickly close out the game. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with its powerful creatures and mana advantage.

The deck focuses on quickly reanimating powerful creatures like Griselbrand and Ulamog, the Defiler using cards like Goryo's Vengeance and Ephemerate. It also includes a variety of instant spells for removal and disruption, along with creatures like Atraxa, Grand Unifier and Quantum Riddler for additional value and protection. The goal is to set up a fast and powerful combo while controlling the board and disrupting the opponent's game plan.

This deck focuses on combining aggressive creatures with disruptive elements to control the board and pressure the opponent. It utilizes cards like Phelia, Exuberant Shepherd and Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer to apply early pressure, while also including removal spells like Prismatic Ending and Consign to Memory to deal with threats. The deck also features cards like Teferi, Time Raveler and Arena of Glory to disrupt the opponent's strategy and protect its own creatures. Additionally, it includes powerful finishers like Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury to close out games quickly.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on utilizing cheap and efficient creatures and burn spells to quickly overwhelm the opponent with aggressive plays. Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Ocelot Pride provide early pressure while Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury and Ajani, Nacatl Pariah offer additional late-game threats. Goblin Bombardment and Galvanic Discharge add burn damage and removal options, while cards like Thraben Charm and Ranger-Captain of Eos provide versatility in combat. The deck aims to maintain a fast pace and apply continuous pressure to secure a victory before the opponent can stabilize.

The deck focuses on quickly and aggressively attacking the opponent with efficient and high-impact creatures while using burn spells to control the board and finish off the opponent. It also utilizes card draw and scrying effects to maintain card advantage and find key pieces of the combo. The deck aims to apply pressure early in the game and maintain tempo to overwhelm the opponent before they can stabilize or mount a defense. It combines the speed and aggression of red cards with the card advantage and flexibility of blue and green cards for a well-rounded aggressive strategy.

The deck focuses on aggressive gameplay by utilizing creatures with powerful abilities and spells that disrupt the opponent's strategy. It aims to apply pressure early in the game while also hindering the opponent's game plan through cards like Quantum Riddler and Consign to Memory. The deck also includes cards like Teferi, Time Raveler and Prismatic Ending for additional control and disruption. The mana base is designed to support the aggressive playstyle with a mix of fetch lands and shock lands.

This deck focuses on utilizing the synergy between Amulet of Vigor and cards like Simic Growth Chamber and Gruul Turf to generate a large amount of mana quickly. The goal is to ramp up to play powerful cards like Primeval Titan and Scapeshift, allowing for explosive combos and overwhelming board presence. The inclusion of cards like Boseiju, Who Endures and Lotus Field provides additional utility and versatility to adapt to different situations. By efficiently managing resources and setting up the right sequences, this deck aims to overwhelm opponents with its powerful plays and tempo advantage.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on being aggressive and overwhelming the opponent with a combination of creatures and burn spells. It utilizes cards like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Guide of Souls to quickly establish a board presence, while also using Galvanic Discharge and Goblin Bombardment to deal direct damage to the opponent. The deck also includes cards like Seasoned Pyromancer and Ajani, Nacatl Pariah to generate card advantage and maintain pressure on the opponent. This deck aims to win the game quickly and efficiently through a combination of creature beatdown and burn spells.

This deck focuses on quickly deploying artifact creatures and using various artifacts to generate additional value and disruption. The key strategy is to overwhelm the opponent with aggressive plays and efficient removal while leveraging card advantage from artifacts like Mishra's Bauble and Emry, Lurker of the Loch. The deck also has a toolbox of artifacts to disrupt the opponent's game plan, such as Pithing Needle and Soul-Guide Lantern. By combining aggression with utility, the deck aims to outpace and outmaneuver opponents in a fast-paced Modern 1 vs 1 environment.
